concerns.text: Tasks T060-T074 in Phase 7 (Reviewer Concerns) are marked as unchecked [ ] while all other tasks are [X], indicating incomplete implementation or unclear status. This violates coverage for the reviewer concerns outlined in the spec.
Task T063 (Implement physical geometry constraints validator) is linked to FR-001, but FR-001 is about downloading the QM9 dataset, not geometry validation. This is a mis-tagging.

Task T065 (Implement validation protocol specification document) is linked to Curie/Franklin review, but there is no explicit FR/SC in the spec that directly addresses the validation protocol documentation. This is a missing coverage.

Task T066 (Create experimental benchmark dataset loader) is linked to Franklin review, but there is no explicit FR/SC in the spec that directly addresses the experimental benchmark loading. This is a missing coverage.

Task T067 (Implement conformational ensemble sampler) is linked to Franklin review, but there is no explicit FR/SC in the spec that directly addresses conformational ensemble sampling. This is a missing coverage.

Task T068 (Add hydration state control experiment) is linked to Franklin review, but there is no explicit FR/SC in the spec that directly addresses hydration state control. This is a missing coverage.
Task T069 (Implement physics-informed loss function) is linked to Feynman review, but there is no explicit FR/SC in the spec that directly addresses physics-informed loss. This is a missing coverage.

Task T070 (Add stereoisomer-specific error analysis) is linked to Pauling review, but there is no explicit FR/SC in the spec that directly addresses stereoisomer error analysis. This is a missing coverage.

Task T071 (Implement atomic partial charge extraction) is linked to Pauling review, but there is no explicit FR/SC in the spec that directly addresses atomic partial charge extraction. This is a missing coverage.

Task T072 (Generate molecular property reference table) is linked to Pauling review, but there is no explicit FR/SC in the spec that directly addresses the reference table. This is a missing coverage.

Task T073 (Document hydration state limitation) is linked to Curie/Franklin review, but there is no explicit FR/SC in the spec that directly addresses documentation of limitations. This is a missing coverage.
Task T074 (Create interpretability report) is linked to Feynman review, but there is no explicit FR/SC in the spec that directly addresses the interpretability report. This is a missing coverage.

The description of Phase 1 is very general ("Project initialization and basic structure"). It lacks specific tasks tied to the spec's requirements. While tasks T001-T003 are present, they don't explicitly map to a specific FR/SC.

The description of Phase 2 is very general ("Core infrastructure that MUST be complete before ANY user story can be implemented"). It lacks specific tasks tied to the spec's requirements. While tasks T004-T009 are present, they don't explicitly map to a specific FR/SC.
